scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('public', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('artifacts/pathfinder/dist/public', 'public', { recursive: true });"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
